parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a human actor and an AI-generated avatar. The top character exhibits typical AI traits: perfectly smooth skin, static framing, and slightly unnatural lip-sync. The bottom character is a real human recorded in a natural setting.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, medium brown complexion, dark hair tied back, wearing a bindi. She has symmetrical features and smooth skin.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey or black collared jacket with white stitching details along the lapels and shoulders.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, dark complexion, short dark hair styled with a slight quiff. He has a mustache and a light beard.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved shirt with a blue and grey leaf or floral pattern.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, initially hesitant but becomes eager and convinced.

scenes.setting: Top: blurred futuristic lab. Bottom: plain yellow wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A looking directly at the camera with a neutral, attentive expression. She is framed centrally. The background is a blurred, brightly lit laboratory setting featuring people in white coats working at computers and robotic arms.
A medium close-up of Character B looking directly at the camera and speaking expressively. He uses slight head movements to emphasize his points. The background is a plain, solid yellow wall.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing two individuals seemingly on a video call. The top half features a female avatar in a high-tech environment, while the bottom half shows a young man in a simple room. The man is actively speaking and explaining a situation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ನಾನು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದಾಗ ನನ್ನ ಫ್ರೆಂಡ್ ನಗ್ತಾನೆ. [When I try to speak English, my friend laughs.]
Character B says: ಒಂದು ದಿನ ನಾನು ಹೇಳ್ದೆ, 'ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಸ್ ವೆರಿ ವೀಕ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ' ಅಂತ. [One day I said, 'My English is very weak only'.]
Character B says: ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ನನ್ನ ಫ್ರೆಂಡ್ ಹೇಳ್ದ, 'ವೀಕ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ' ನಾ? ಏನ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಗುರು ನಿಂದು ಅಂತಾನೆ. [To that my friend said, 'Weak only'? What kind of English is yours, bro.]
Character B says: ಆಗ ನನಗೆ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಬೇಜಾರಾಯ್ತು. [Then I felt a little sad.]

scenes.setting: Top: blurred futuristic lab. Bottom: plain yellow wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A. She is now smiling warmly and speaking directly to the camera. The blurred laboratory background remains unchanged.
A medium close-up of Character B. He is looking towards the camera, listening attentively with a slightly more relaxed expression. The plain yellow background remains unchanged.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen continues. The female avatar on top is now speaking, offering a solution, while the man on the bottom listens. A brand logo appears overlaid on the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಬೇಜಾರಾಗ್ಬೇಡ. ನಾನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಪರ್ಸನಲ್ ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್. ನಾನು ಜಡ್ಜ್ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ. [Don't be sad. I am your personal AI teacher. I won't judge.]
Character A says: ನೀವು ಡೈಲಿ ಸ್ಪೀಕ್ ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಆಪ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ 15-20 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. [It's enough if you practice for 15-20 minutes daily on the SpeakX app.]
Character A says: ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆ ಪರ್ಫೆಕ್ಟ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಲು ಹೇಳಿಕೊಡ್ತೀನಿ. [I will teach you to speak perfect English.]

scenes.setting: Top: blurred futuristic lab. Bottom: plain yellow wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A. She maintains a friendly smile while speaking and providing instruction. The blurred laboratory background is consistent.
A medium close-up of Character B. He speaks to the camera, asking a question, and then repeats a phrase with a focused expression. The plain yellow background is consistent.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen format is maintained. The man asks a question and provides an example sentence. The AI avatar responds and corrects his English sentence. The man then repeats the corrected sentence.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ಹೌದಾ? ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನೊಂದು ಸೆಂಟೆನ್ಸ್ ಹೇಳ್ತೀನಿ, ಸರಿ ಇದ್ಯಾ ಅಂತ ಹೇಳಿ. [Is it? Then I will say a sentence, tell me if it's correct.]
Character A says: ಸರಿ, ನೀವು ಸೆಂಟೆನ್ಸ್ ಹೇಳಿ. [Okay, you say the sentence.]
Character B says: ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಸ್ ದಟ್ ವೀಕ್. [My English is that weak.]
Character A says: ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳಿ: [Say it like this:]
Character A says: ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಸ್ ನಾಟ್ ವೆರಿ ಸ್ಟ್ರಾಂಗ್. [My English is not very strong.]
Character B says: ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಸ್ ನಾಟ್ ವೆರಿ ಸ್ಟ್ರಾಂಗ್. [My English is not very strong.]

scenes.setting: Top: blurred futuristic lab. Bottom: plain yellow wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A. She speaks with a reassuring and informative expression. The blurred laboratory background remains the same.
A medium close-up of Character B. He speaks with an expression of pleasant surprise and conviction, nodding slightly. The plain yellow background remains the same.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen continues to the end. The man asks about the price, and the AI avatar answers with the cost details. The man concludes by stating his intention to download the app. A brand logo appears overlaid again.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ನನಗೆ ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಗೆ ತುಂಬಾ ದುಡ್ಡು ಬೇಕು ಅಂತ. [I feel this app requires a lot of money.]
Character A says: ಇಲ್ಲ. 7 ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 29 ರೂಪಾಯಿ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 4 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಮಾತ್ರ. [No. Only 29 rupees for 7 days. Just 4 rupees per day.]
Character B says: ಹೌದಾ? ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ ಸ್ಪೀಕ್ ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಆಪ್ ನ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Is it? Then I will download the SpeakX app right now and speak English confidently.]
